[header]
4E 45 53 1A  # iNES magic
01           # PRG banks
01           # CHR banks
00           # flags6 (horizontal mirroring, mapper 0)
00           # flags7
00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00  # padding

[prg_rom]

00 80  # NMI vector  ($8000)
